column1: # Absorption parity corpus manifest. One row per case.
#   case_id        directory name under corpus/ and expected/
#   doc_relpath    the document under corpus/<case_id>/ to validate (and the
#                  document the external check was captured over)
#   check_codes    comma-separated engine codes to run for this case's family
#                  (the absorbed check(s) whose parity this case proves)
#                                 over the case's tree and collect lifecycle
#                                 the engine absorbs as L07, runs this way).
# A case proves that, over its document, the engine's fired-rule SET matches the
# external check's captured fired-rule SET (translated via mapping.tsv), modulo
# any deliberate divergence recorded in divergences.tsv.
# The frontmatter/sections/status-directory cases use design documents because
# the external frontmatter/sections/status-directory checks are design-document
# validators; their baselines are real captures from those checks (see
